action.reasoning: Observation: packaged Qwen baseline is valid but weak (test 0.0278) and the latest inspection output was not useful because it printed truncated prediction logs rather than the requested code/statistics. Analysis: I still need a clean view of the existing model.py/predict.py/train.py, dataset schema/label distribution, and PEFT/TRL availability before editing; current validation raw fields are empty likely because predict_one does not retain generation text, so I need inspect exact implementation. Decision: run a compact file/stat inspection that writes details to logs/iter_${RAB_ITERATION}/inspect.json and prints only a short summary, then use it to implement either LoRA fine-tuning or prompt/scaling fixes next.
